_comment_howToEdit: Admin: to allow/block a location, edit the arrays below and commit/push this file. No code change needed. Site will pick up new rules on next page load after deployment.
_comment_pincodeLogic: Primary check is numeric range. India Post confirms West Bengal PIN codes start with digits 70-74 (range 700000-749999). NOTE: PIN codes 744xxx belong to Andaman & Nicobar Islands, NOT West Bengal, even though they start with '74'. That specific sub-range is excluded below. Admin should verify edge-case pincodes against https://www.indiapost.gov.in and add overrides as needed.
restrictionMessage: Sorry! We currently deliver only within West Bengal, India. We're working on expanding soon.
